description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, black glass touchscreen on the front. The back is a smooth, light purple surface with a prominent raised camera module in the top left corner, housing three large camera lenses and a smaller flash. The sides are flat and metallic, matching the purple tone of the back, and include subtle button placements. The device is thin and compact, typical of contemporary mobile phones, and appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The phone's proportions and features suggest it is designed for handheld use and portability.
description: A sleek, light purple smartphone with a large black glass screen and a triple-lens camera module on the back. The design is minimalist, with flat sides and no visible branding.
description_view_0: The front view shows a large, black glass touchscreen dominating the surface, with rounded corners and no visible buttons or logos.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the phone's slim profile and flat metallic edge, with a small button visible near the center.
description_view_2: The back view displays a smooth, light purple surface with a prominent triple-lens camera module and flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the flat edge and shows two small buttons, likely for volume or power control.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is completely black, indicating it is either turned off or in standby mode, with no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array with three large lenses and a flash, all located in a raised square module at the top left corner on the back of the phone.
attribute_button_layout: There are two small buttons on the right edge and one small button on the left edge, likely for power and volume control.
